message: So there I was, out for a lovely walk with my dog, Max. The sun was shining, and everything felt perfect—until my phone decided to die right when I needed it most! I had a sudden panic thinking about how I’d need to call for help if Max decided to chase a squirrel into the woods. Thankfully, we made it back home without incident, but it got me thinking about how important it is to have a little backup plan in place. Maybe I should keep a portable charger in my bag next time! Have you ever had a tech fail at just the wrong moment? 🐾
